name: ICP Ltd.
summary: ICP Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the hospitality, and vessel ownership and chartering activities in Singapore, Malaysia, Korea, Hong Kong, and internationally. It is also involved in the ownership of hotels, as well as management and franchising of the Travelodge hotel brand. In addition, the company provides management consultancy services; owns trademark rights; offers leasing services; and invests in quoted and/or unquoted securities, including debentures, stocks, shares, and units in any fund or collective investment scheme. Further, it owns and charters two steel petroleum product tankers. The company was formerly known as Goldtron Limited and changed its name to ICP Ltd. in 2012. ICP Ltd. was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Singapore.
